bug_summary: 自定义编辑器直接拷贝扩展快捷键处理函数，调用上下文丢失
fix_summary: 改为箭头函数委托 (data) => this.defaultEditor.onExtensionShortcut?.(data)，保持上下文
wrong_behavior: 直接赋值 customEditor.onExtensionShortcut = defaultEditor.onExtensionShortcut 丢失 this
correct_behavior: 箭头函数委托确保 defaultEditor 上下文正确

preconditions.what: customEditor 和 defaultEditor 均已初始化

assertions.what: 快捷键正确委托到 defaultEditor
